ASPECTSCOLORLESS-DRUNK.title: Drunk
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-WEIRDO.title: Weirdo!
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-WEIRDO.description:
[gold]Transmute[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: and [gold]Upgrade[/gold]|} the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Put it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GOLDEN_LANCE.title: Golden Lance
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GOLDEN_LANCE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The second time this card is played each combat, triple the damage.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-HAPPY_HOUR.title: Happy Hour!
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-HAPPY_HOUR.description:
[gold]Transmute[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Drunk+[/gold]|[gold]Drunk[/gold]}.
Remove this card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-LUNARI_CHARM.title: Lunari Charm
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-LUNARI_CHARM.descriptio: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] that deals damage with the same parity as the cost of this card, refund its cost.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-THE_RUNE.title: The Rune
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-THE_RUNE.description: Whenever you gain energy during your turn, draw 1 card.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-PENNY.title: Penny
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-PENNY.description: At the end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-INTERFERENCE.title: Interference
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-INTERFERENCE.descriptio: Remove all [gold]Buffs[/gold] from an enemy. They lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-TWILIGHT_SPILL.title: Twilight Spill
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-TWILIGHT_SPILL.descript:
Deal {MinDamage:diff()}-{MaxDamage:diff()} damage.
For the rest of this game, swap the colors of {SwapCount} random [gold]Colorless[/gold] cards with an equal number of random cards from color pools matching enemy [gold]Intents[/gold].
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GIFT.title: Gift
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GIFT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Apply a [gold]Gift[/gold] containing copies of the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] cards.
ASPECTSCOLORLESS-GIFT.selectionScreenPro: Choose up to {MaxCount} cards to [gold]Exhaust[/gold] (and deliver).
